In this study, the ability of <jats:styled-content style=\"fixed-case\">EWDRS<\/jats:styled-content> to identify the margins of pigmented skin lesions in an in vivo pig model was evaluated.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title>Materials and methods<\/jats:title><jats:p>Extended\u2010wavelength diffuse reflectance spectroscopy recordings (350\u20101550\u00a0nm) were made on 13 pigmented skin lesions and non\u2010pigmented skin, as a reference. The hand\u2010held probe was swept toward the pigmented area until the signal changed, thus indicating that the margin had been identified. A needle was inserted as a marker, and tissue samples were sent for histological analysis. The distance between the <jats:styled-content style=\"fixed-case\">EWDRS<\/jats:styled-content>\u2010defined border and the histological border was measured by 3 independent examiners.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title>Results<\/jats:title><jats:p>The median difference between the <jats:styled-content style=\"fixed-case\">EWDRS<\/jats:styled-content>\u2010defined border and the histological border was 70\u00a0\u03bcm toward the pigmented tissue (range: \u2212579 to 538\u00a0\u03bcm). A Pearson correlation coefficient of .95 was obtained for the examiners.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title>Conclusions<\/jats:title><jats:p>Extended\u2010wavelength diffuse reflectance spectroscopy can be used in vivo to delineate the border of pigmented skin lesions in a porcine model with high accuracy, indicating that it may be a useful tool for non\u2010invasive tumor margin delineation in the future.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec>","DOI":"10.1111\/srt.12583","type":"journal-article","created":{"date-parts":[[2018,5,18]],"date-time":"2018-05-18T04:25:37Z","timestamp":1526617537000},"page":"667-671","update-policy":"https:\/\/doi.org\/10.1002\/crossmark_policy","source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":11,"title":["Identification of tumor margins using diffuse reflectance spectroscopy with an extended\u2010wavelength spectrum in a porcine model"],"prefix":"10.1111","volume":"24","author":[{"ORCID":"https:\/\/orcid.org\/0000-0002-6843-7896","authenticated-orcid":false,"given":"U.","family":"Dahlstrand","sequence":"first","affiliation":[{"name":"Sk\u00e5ne University Hospital Department of Clinical Sciences Lund, Ophthalmology Lund University  Lund Sweden"}],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"R.","family":"Sheikh","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[{"name":"Sk\u00e5ne University Hospital Department of Clinical Sciences Lund, Ophthalmology Lund University  Lund Sweden"}],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"C.
